description: An interstellar medium (ISM) researcher is mapping dust extinction across three dense dark nebulae (Bok globules) in the Milky Way. Using the target manifest at ~/Documents/observation_manifest.txt, capture multi-band (B, V, R) images and sky survey images for each nebula. Apply dynamic chromatic aberration focus offsets in the Focuser Simulator for each filter. Produce a CSV observation log and organize all captured data into the directory structure specified in the manifest.
